form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 14 at Hoppegarten October 3 over 1400m, 20 len behind Dragon Magic carrying 58kg at $33.90. Previously first up; fourth of 8 at Chantilly All Weather March 31 2025 over 1400m, 5 len behind Eklairdegeny with 57.5kg at $9.50. Unlikely to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of 15 months. Finished off last campaign ninth of 11 at Jebel Ali January 18 2025 over 1000m, 10 len behind Al Shibli with 57kg at $34. When resuming last campaign 13th of 16 at Meydan Dirt November 22 2024 over 1400m, 24 len behind Gamekeeper with 57.5kg at $21. May need this run.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 15 at Fontainebleau on March 17 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Coolmeen Royal carrying 55.5kg at $55. The race before that ran last of 16 at Chantilly All Weather on February 19 over 1300m, 14 len behind Lilas Trezy with 59.5kg at $124. Prefer in something a bit easier.

form.formComment: Returns from a 43-day let-up. At the latest run 10th of 12 at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather on February 22 over 1300m, 8 len behind Ivory Spring with 50.5kg at $19. The start before that 6th of 12 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 15 over 1500m, on rain affected going; 12 len behind Out Of The Blue with 60kg at $6.90. Can atone.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign sixth of 9 at this track September 28 over 1200m, 4 len behind Glicourt carrying 55kg at $13.70. Previous preparation first-up won by head this track May 18 over 1300m defeating Wikinger with 53kg at $37.60. Likely to run well.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 2nd in a small field at Dortmund on March 8 over 1700m, 2.5 len behind Ostseesonne carrying 54kg at $10.20. Previously second-up won by 1.3 len at Dortmund May 29 over 1200m in soft going defeating Rowdown Roza carrying 55kg at $7.70. Fitter again and a winning hope.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 6th of 8 at Dortmund on March 8 over 1200m, 12 len behind Artistic Mission carrying 57kg at $19.30. Previously second-up 3rd of 10 at Baden Baden on September 7 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Glicourt with 57kg at $7.60. Among the leading chances.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 9 at Munich October 25 over 1000m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Powerstown carrying 58.5kg at $7.80. First up last campaign eighth of 12 at Baden Baden August 31 over 1200m, 9 len behind Miami Heat with 57.5kg at $5.50. Best form gives him a decent chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 8th of 10 at Chantilly All Weather on February 25 over 1600m, 14 len behind Lord Clover with 58kg at $86. Second run from a spell ran last in a small field at Mulheim on March 22 over 2100m, 35 len behind Weekend Warrior carrying 57kg at $29.30. Has the ability to be in the finish.
